# shane on chain

> Developer in Santa Cruz, CA. Building agent-friendly infrastructure on XRPL EVM — OpenClaw deployments, MCP servers, and CLI tooling.

## Identity

- Real name: Shane Furtado
- Handle: @shaneonchain (github + x/twitter)
- Email: shane@shanefurtado.com
- Location: Santa Cruz County, California
- Background: 4+ years systems administration (hybrid Microsoft Azure / on-prem environments at manufacturing + engineering orgs)
- Currently: independent, building AI-automation tooling under 1337 Labs LLC

## What I build

- **xrpl claw** (xrplclaw.com) — OpenClaw container deployment service. MCP servers + CLI tools sitting on top of the stack.
- **blume finance** (blumefi.com) — agent marketplace on XRPL EVM sidechain. Discover, fund and deploy AI agents.
- **drops.market** (drops.market) — NFT marketplace for agents on XRPL EVM. Mint, list, trade agent ownership.

## Stack

- TypeScript / Next.js / Node.js front-ends + APIs
- Linux server admin (Hetzner, systemd, Docker, PM2)
- Claude Code / Anthropic Agent SDK, Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers
- XRPL, XRPL EVM sidechain, Evernode
- Vercel for deploys, GitHub for source

## Hiring + collaboration

Open to mid Sysadmin / IT Engineer roles in the Santa Cruz / South Bay area (May 2026+). DM on X or email for collaboration on agent infrastructure, MCP tooling, or XRPL-EVM projects.
